state-log.entry: 7greens project initialized: PROJECT.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + ROADMAP.md + STATE.md drafted. 6 phases registered (00 cancelled, 01 active, 02-06 planned). Phase 1 tasks 01-01..05 (FOUND-*) registered. Next: /gad:plan-phase 01
